label: World-model rollout & imagination

node.label: World-model rollout & imagination
node.definition: World-model rollout simulates possible futures in learned latent or observation space so a policy or planner can evaluate actions without immediate real-world interaction.
node.why_it_matters: The role of World-model rollout & imagination is to connect Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI.
examples: combined with Latent world models & predictive dynamics
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning.

dependencies.rationale: World-model rollout & imagination uses Latent world models & predictive dynamics as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
World-model rollout & imagination uses Model-based reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
World-model rollout & imagination uses Monte Carlo tree search as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
